violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the receiving area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the dairy cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
At the time of inspection, drinks were stored in mop sink. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 07/01/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/15/2024
